case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. BRIANA JAVAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAVAR, BRIANA $10,806.02 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,806.02, SEE SCANNED DOC
